input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.6.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.6.7
            TITLE: cells with internal overcurrent protection may be used without external overcurrent

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.6.7: Cells with internal Overcurrent Protection may be used without external Overcurrent
EV.6.6.7 Cells with internal Overcurrent Protection may be used without external Overcurrent 
Protection if suitably rated. 
Most cell internal Overcurrent Protection devices are Low Voltage or non voltage rated and 
conditions of EV.6.6.5 above will apply.

final_answer: Cells with internal Overcurrent Protection may be used without external Overcurrent Protection if suitably rated. Most cell internal Overcurrent Protection devices are Low Voltage or non voltage rated and conditions of EV.6.6.5 above will apply.
